\centry{Veridian Technologies}{Strategy and Analytics Analyst}{Austin, TX}{August 2021 -- March 2023}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Supported strategic planning cycles by building financial models and competitive landscape analyses used to prioritize \$18M in annual product investment
  \item Developed and maintained SQL pipelines to automate recurring reporting on customer health, usage, and cohort retention, replacing manual Excel processes across three teams
  \item Collaborated with Product and Engineering to define and track OKRs for two platform launches, synthesizing telemetry data and user research into monthly leadership briefs
  \item Conducted win/loss analysis on 300+ sales opportunities, identifying pricing and positioning gaps that informed a revised sales playbook adopted company-wide
\end{itemize}
